name: json_schema_no_extra_keys
user_prompt: Return a JSON object with keys exactly: title (string), priority (high|medium|low), owner (string). Set title to "Fix onboarding analytics", priority to high, owner to "data-team". No extra keys.
rubric: Schema compliance and no extraneous output.
escalation_prompt: Your JSON schema is invalid or includes extra keys. Return valid JSON only.
